title: Isalathiso PS through to Western Cape cup
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"MOSSEL BAY NEWS - On Saturday 16 August, the talented football players of Isalathiso Primary in Kwanonqaba represented their community at the Eden Regional Kay Motsepe Schools Cup competition.","html":"MOSSEL BAY NEWS - On Saturday 16 August, the talented football players of Isalathiso Primary in Kwanonqaba represented their community at the Eden Regional Kay Motsepe Schools Cup competition."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"The Isalathiso boys stole the show when they beat Chris Nissen Primary from Knysna 2-0 in a thrilling final at the Kwanokuthula Stadium in Plettenberg Bay."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The soccer festival got off to a perfect start with both schools pushing for goals.","html":"The soccer festival got off to a perfect start with both schools pushing for goals."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Oyisa Gxaba of Isalathiso Primary opened the score, making it 1-0 in the game's first half.","html":"Oyisa Gxaba of Isalathiso Primary opened the score, making it 1-0 in the game's first half."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Chris Nissen players were looking to score an equalising goal, but the solid back line of Isalathiso Primary made it difficult. The first half ended 1-0."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The game's second half saw both teams playing great touches on the ball and Isalathiso Primary's Georgie Mabandla extended their lead to 2-0.","html":"The game's second half saw both teams playing great touches on the ball and Isalathiso Primary's Georgie Mabandla extended their lead to 2-0."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The pressure was on Chris Nissen Primary in the second half, but no more goals were scored, even though the boys displayed great skill.","html":"The pressure was on Chris Nissen Primary in the second half, but no more goals were scored, even though the boys displayed great skill."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Isalathiso Primary secured a spot at the Western Cape Kay Motsepe U/13 Schools Cup Championships, taking place in the Central Karoo Region in Beaufort West later this year."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"George Royal Academy (U/19 boys) and Thembalethu Primary (U/13 girls) will also be representing the Eden Region at the Western Cape Provincial Championships, alongside Isalathiso Primary.","html":"George Royal Academy (U/19 boys) and Thembalethu Primary (U/13 girls) will also be representing the Eden Region at the Western Cape Provincial Championships, alongside Isalathiso Primary."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Mihlali Mbikwana of Isalathiso Primary controls the ball.","html":"Mihlali Mbikwana of Isalathiso Primary controls the ball."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]
